spec: DAVID Visual-Source Manifest v1 (reuses SCIENCE/HISTORY reference-plate pattern)
license_policy: Public sources only; cite provenance + license on every image; 403/paywall/blocked = PARK (no bypass).

entries.subject: Egyptian hieroglyphic — Ptolemy cartouche (Rosetta Stone)
entries.transcription: Cartouche: reed-leaf + stool + lion + lion + reed-leaf + folded-cloth (royal-name ring)
entries.interpretation: Royal name 'Ptolemy' (Ptolemaios); the stele bears a trilingual priestly decree, Memphis, 196 BCE (hieroglyphic / Demotic / Greek).

claims.claim: The cartouche spells the royal name Ptolemy (p-t-w-l-m-y-s).
claims.citation: Champollion, J.-F. (1822), Lettre à M. Dacier relative à l'alphabet des hiéroglyphes phonétiques.

claims.claim: The three scripts record one decree, enabling the decipherment.
claims.citation: British Museum, object EA24 (Rosetta Stone), collection record.

entries.license: © The Trustees of the British Museum, CC BY-NC-SA 4.0

entries.subject: Minoan Linear A — Haghia Triada tablet (sign sequence)
entries.transcription: Linear A sign sequence per GORILA sign list (e.g. AB01 AB02 …)
entries.transliteration: Tentative phonetic values borrowed from Linear B (provisional, sound-only)
dissent: Phonetic values inferred from Linear B are provisional; the underlying language and semantics remain UNKNOWN.

claims.claim: Sign forms are catalogued in the standard Linear A corpus; the script's meaning is UNDECIPHERED.
claims.citation: Godart, L. & Olivier, J.-P. (1976–1985), GORILA: Recueil des inscriptions en linéaire A.

entries.license: image PD line-drawing / CC where applicable — verify per file
entries.honesty_note: R7: no meaning asserted for an undeciphered script — interpretation deliberately null.

parked_sources.policy: 403/paywall/blocked = PARK; no bypass, no fabricated provenance.

parked.reason: high-res TIFF behind institutional access wall — returns 403
parked.fallback: GORILA line-drawing + Wikimedia Commons category used for reference instead
